changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 9

changeSet.comment: Create Data Analysis and Export page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Analyze validated data and prepare final outputs. Record analysis details (software used, analyst name, analysis date, notes). Flag samples with validation status (VALID, INVALID, INCONCLUSIVE) with reason if not valid. Export results to Excel or CSV format (raw or processed data). Record result delivery to recipients. Lock raw data when analysis is complete to maintain audit trail. Send validated samples to Reporting page when ready.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 9

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD' AND display_order = 9

changeSet.comment: Insert MNTD Data Analysis and Export workflow page template

column.name: description
column.value: Analyze validated data, flag samples, export results, and prepare for reporting

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Record analysis details (software, analyst, date). Flag samples as VALID, INVALID, or INCONCLUSIVE. Export results to Excel or CSV. Record delivery to recipients. Lock raw data when complete.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Data Analysis and Export - Validation, export, and delivery
